summary: 0.6.36 fixes a short-range A-B endpoint scrub regression and rebases demo3 side-screen control clones to the correct relative transforms.
operatorSignals: Very short A-B ranges still felt wrong when scrubbing to the end of the loop window.
demo3 side-screen controls were parented correctly but still carrying the middle-screen transform data.
actionsTaken: Mapped normalized A-B scrubs across the active loop window and suppressed paused-frame refresh at active A-B boundaries.
Added a demo3-only relative-transform rebase step for left and right control clones before linking them to their target screens.
nonGoals: No incremental A-B scrub behavior beyond the shared boundary fix.
